'''âw-l-th''' ('''kawalath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codistil|codistil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codistil|codistil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-l-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawalath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwalath|thiwalath]] || [[word:jiwalath|jiwalath]] || [[word:shiwalath|shiwalath]] || [[word:kiwalath|kiwalath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwalath|thuthuwalath]] || [[word:jujuwalath|jujuwalath]] || [[word:shushuwalath|shushuwalath]] || [[word:kukuwalath|kukuwalath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwalath|thuwalath]] || [[word:juwalath|juwalath]] || [[word:shuwalath|shuwalath]] || [[word:kuwalath|kuwalath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwalath|thuwalath]] || [[word:juwalath|juwalath]] || [[word:shuwalath|shuwalath]] || [[word:kuwalath|kuwalath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewalath|thewalath]] || [[word:jewalath|jewalath]] || [[word:shewalath|shewalath]] || [[word:kewalath|kewalath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowalath|thothowalath]] || [[word:jojowalath|jojowalath]] || [[word:shoshowalath|shoshowalath]] || [[word:kokowalath|kokowalath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowalath|thowalath]] || [[word:jowalath|jowalath]] || [[word:showalath|showalath]] || [[word:kowalath|kowalath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowalath|thowalath]] || [[word:jowalath|jowalath]] || [[word:showalath|showalath]] || [[word:kowalath|kowalath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwalath|thĂŠwalath]] || [[word:jĂŠwalath|jĂŠwalath]] || [[word:shĂŠwalath|shĂŠwalath]] || [[word:kĂŠwalath|kĂŠwalath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawalath|thathawalath]] || [[word:jajawalath|jajawalath]] || [[word:shashawalath|shashawalath]] || [[word:kakawalath|kakawalath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawalath|thawalath]] || [[word:jawalath|jawalath]] || [[word:shawalath|shawalath]] || [[word:kawalath|kawalath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawalath|thawalath]] || [[word:jawalath|jawalath]] || [[word:shawalath|shawalath]] || [[word:kawalath|kawalath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawalath|shawalath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawalath|goshawalath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawalath|gokishawalath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawalathnĂŒ|shawalathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawalathnknĂŒ|goshawalathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalathnĂŒ|gokishawalathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawalathshĂ«|shawalathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawalathnkshĂ«|goshawalathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawalathshĂ«|gokishawalathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalathro|shawalathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalathnkro|goshawalathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalathro|gokishawalathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalathmu|shawalathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalathnkmu|goshawalathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalathmu|gokishawalathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawalathsher|shawalathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawalathnksher|goshawalathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawalathsher|gokishawalathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawalathng|shawalathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawalathnkng|goshawalathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawalathng|gokishawalathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawalathya|shawalathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawalathnkya|goshawalathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawalathya|gokishawalathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawalathyam|shawalathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawalathnkyam|goshawalathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawalathyam|gokishawalathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalathnĂŒshĂ«|shawalathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawalathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawalathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalathnĂŒro|shawalathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalathnknĂŒro|goshawalathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalathnĂŒro|gokishawalathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalathnĂŒmu|shawalathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalathnknĂŒmu|goshawalathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalathnĂŒmu|gokishawalathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalathshĂ«nĂŒ|shawalathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawalathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawalathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalathshĂ«ro|shawalathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalathnkshĂ«ro|goshawalathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalathshĂ«ro|gokishawalathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalathshĂ«mu|shawalathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalathnkshĂ«mu|goshawalathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalathshĂ«mu|gokishawalathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalathronĂŒ|shawalathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalathnkronĂŒ|goshawalathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalathronĂŒ|gokishawalathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalathroshĂ«|shawalathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalathnkroshĂ«|goshawalathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalathroshĂ«|gokishawalathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalathromu|shawalathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalathnkromu|goshawalathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalathromu|gokishawalathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalathmunĂŒ|shawalathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalathnkmunĂŒ|goshawalathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalathmunĂŒ|gokishawalathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalathmushĂ«|shawalathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalathnkmushĂ«|goshawalathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalathmushĂ«|gokishawalathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalathmuro|shawalathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalathnkmuro|goshawalathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalathmuro|gokishawalathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
